games.title: Among Us
games.description: Social deduction multiplayer — crewmates complete tasks while impostors sabotage and kill; suss out the traitors via meetings and votes.

games.title: Arknights
games.description: Real-time tower defense + RPG hybrid where players deploy anime "Operators" onto tiled maps to intercept enemies. Gacha-driven roster; PvE focused; intricate puzzle-style stages.

games.title: Balatro
games.description: Poker-themed deckbuilder roguelike. Build poker hands against escalating "blind" scores, stack Jokers and consumables to multiply chips × mult into absurd numbers, clear 8 antes per run.

games.title: Brawl Stars
games.description: Top-down real-time 3v3 mobile shooter with a roster of distinct heroes ("brawlers"), each with a basic attack, super ability, and per-match progression. Short matches across multiple PvP and PvE modes.

games.title: Candy Crush Saga
games.description: The match-3 saga-map genre originator — swap candies to match 3+, clear levels on a world map, earn 3-star scores, with limited lives, boosters, and thousands of hand-designed levels.

games.title: Clash of Clans
games.description: Asynchronous base-building mobile strategy game. Players develop a defended village, train troops, and raid other players' bases offline in 3-minute timed attacks.

games.title: Clash Royale
games.description: Real-time 1v1 mobile PvP deckbuilder played on a 3-lane arena. Players spend a regenerating elixir resource to deploy 8-card decks and destroy the opponent's towers inside a 3-minute match (plus overtime).

games.title: Counter-Strike
games.description: Tactical 5v5 round-based FPS where economy, map control, and precision aim compound into decisive minutes.

games.title: Darkest Dungeon
games.description: Gothic horror turn-based party RPG. Recruit heroes, send 4-person parties into procedural dungeons, manage stress alongside HP. Heroes break, die, acquire afflictions — and sometimes succeed anyway.

games.title: Dead Cells
games.description: 2D action metroidvania roguelite. Control a reanimated mass of cells who possesses corpses and fights through procedurally arranged biomes. Die, lose progress, unlock permanent blueprints, run again.

games.title: Escape from Duckov
games.description: Single-player top-down extraction shooter — ducks-with-guns parody of Tarkov with solo-friendly economy, persistent stash, and 10+ hour tactical loop.

games.title: Escape from Tarkov
games.description: Hardcore extraction-shooter set in a besieged Russian city — ballistic-accurate gunplay, real-time looting, full-loss-on-death, and a deep inventory economy.

games.title: Hades
games.description: Isometric action roguelite set in Greek mythology. Escape the Underworld as Zagreus, son of Hades, using weapons and god-granted Boons. Death is canon — each run reveals more story, characters, and upgrades.

games.title: Hearthstone
games.description: Turn-based collectible card game with mana crystals, hero classes, minion board combat, and spells. The archetypal modern digital CCG.

games.title: Helldivers 2
games.description: Third-person co-op squad shooter where orbital stratagems, massive bug/bot hordes, and a persistent galactic war deliver managed democracy one mission at a time.

games.title: Hollow Knight
games.description: Metroidvania action-adventure — a silent knight descends into the ruined bug kingdom Hallownest, gaining abilities, defeating bosses, and uncovering its fall.

games.title: Marvel Snap
games.description: 3-lane, 6-turn simultaneous card battler where random locations reshape the board every match. Short games, deep decisions, stake-escalation via Snap.

games.title: Pokémon Unite
games.description: 5v5 mobile MOBA where players as Pokémon farm wild mons, level up, fight in lanes, and dunk scored energy into enemy goals. Short matches, simplified MOBA.

games.title: Risk of Rain 2
games.description: Third-person 3D roguelike shooter. Drop onto alien planets, find a teleporter, survive an escalating horde while it charges, loop forever. Item stacking is the core fun.

games.title: Royal Match
games.description: Match-3 puzzle game with a mansion-restoration meta-progression. King Robert's palace, rich tactile feedback, level-pack progression. Top-grossing mobile puzzle.

games.title: Slay the Spire
games.description: Turn-based single-player deckbuilder roguelike. Ascend a three-act spire with one of four characters, drafting cards and relics between turn-based battles against enemies whose next actions are telegraphed each turn.

games.title: Stardew Valley
games.description: Country-life farming sim RPG — inherit a grandfather's farm, grow crops, raise animals, befriend townsfolk, explore mines, marry, restore a valley.

games.title: Toon Blast
games.description: Single-tap blast-3 puzzle — tap groups of 2+ same-color cubes to blast them; clear objectives across 5,000+ cartoon-themed levels with a team-based social meta and pre-/in-level boosters.

games.title: Vampire Survivors
games.description: Bullet-heaven roguelite where a single character auto-attacks swarms of enemies across a 30-minute run while drafting weapon and item builds.
